title: cyanus triumfettii
intro: Cyanus triumfettii, also known as Cornflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic agent, which helps in soothing various health issues. The health benefits of Cornflower include its use in treating eye problems, such as conjunctivitis and dry eyes, as well as its application in calming digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Cornflower include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
